data.content: 1. The parent knot description requires foolery knots-backend changes to replace the addNote acceptance shim and read acceptance back in toBeat(); no foolery backend files or diffs are present in this repository, so that required behavior is not implemented or reviewable from the code under review. 2. Knots-core validation passed in an isolated checkout of branch knots-2412-acceptance-field with make sanity and 95.19% coverage, but that does not satisfy the missing backend scope, so the parent knot cannot be approved as complete.
